raw_text: very bad experience....don't buy any product from blinkit...they are not taking any responsibility for products..once they delivered they didn't respond..if they didn't take any responsibility of the product..why they selling those products...instamart is best superb app and customer support always they give fair and quick resolution...buy from instamart....block this blinkit...don't buy any product from these cheaters blinkit is totally fraud

i am facing problem from two days first phone pe is not allowed so I added money in blinkit money then from two days ordering by that is also not allowed so no I can't order and can't get my money back it's stuck and this apps help not sucks I understand you want more efficiency but after you help bot which only have limited questions and answers you should have an call support system too

Pathetic Experience. so instead of solving the issues of the customer the team is closing the case without an appropriate solution. I received dry and dead plants by the blinkit. on raising the concern, they simply shut the case without replacement of incorrect plants. in total they have done the loss of more than 5k many more on other products and such behaviour is completely intolerable.

the delivery is partial. and customer support is horrible. You have to email for missing items with radio silence at Blinkit's end. Disappointing. Please opt for Swiggy Instamart. Clean and complete deliveries by Swiggy Instamart.

see the service is top notch, if you got doubt and did every thing as it is you will be surprised by the response of it. and also add some extra options to choose once you use frequently you ran out of options later

actually one of the best apps for grocery and stuff but the price needs to be down..like zepeto it usually has the prices down by a bit and one more thing is I see that ice creams are available on zepeto and not blinkit..like there r but only 3..

I received a Pears Body Wash bottle in a leaking condition. I reported the issue immediately, and your team confirmed that a replacement would be provided. However, the replacement has not been delivered yet, and I have not received any update regarding its status. Please check the matter and arrange the replacement or refund at the earliest. I can provide photos of the damaged product if required.

you would not be able to return your order even after multiple requests, as I ordered something mistakenly and the oreder was not returned and I had to pay money for something that I didn't even wanted.

Very disappointing return experience. The item I received was already broken and the quality was extremely poor, so I requested a return. When the delivery person came, instead of taking the item back properly, he started giving unnecessary lectures and arguments and then just left without completing the return. This is completely unprofessional and disrespectful to customers.This is a complete waste of time .

they don't clean their products properly before packing it. so most of the time there is dust or something, just like today there was something sticky on the packet so I washed it and it started foaming up so it was probably some liquid soap or something and i didn't order any type of soap this time so I don't know what it was. I am mostly satisfied with their services but this one thing is really annoying every time.

I paid in full when I bought the product. But the product was bad, so I immediately complained and I asked for a fresh product. In response, they said they would refund the money in 3 to 5 working days.You delivered the product and received the money within 12 minutes. So how long did it take you to return the money? So how many days will you do business with my money and I will wait for the money to be returned.Is this acceptable?Keep in mind that if this continues, your business will suffer.

It's Really nice experience. But after everything they are cert busy and didn't supply regular item, shows because of heavy demand, Yesterday night I need Nycil prickly heat powder urgently, my total order is above 500 but they didn't supply reasons because of huge demand. So please sort out this problem.
To the support team, kindly add back the 'newly added for you' section, was very helpful to browse new products. And the new big, bold prices look too gnarly, the older style was more seamless.

worst app ever seen, they swallowed my 600 rs. be careful while cancelling orders. for cancellation they will provide coupon for paid money and with time limit to use the same. if time lapsed, amount gone and don't know where it will go. for the amount I begged several times to extend the atleast one day to use the coupon, but no proper response. if it is free coupon they can keep time limit.

blink it charged me for approx 5 KM delivery while it is delivering from outlet which is only 397 meters away.. and worst part is that when trying to contact customer support from app, there is no option to call customer service. and I can't even upload my screenshot here too... very very bad service

Very poor experience😫 with Blinkit in Nanded. Payment was deducted instantly, delivery kept getting delayed, support made me wait, and finally the order was cancelled from their side 😡😡. Now asking 4 days for refund for their own mistake. Uninstalling the app 👎👎👎.

3 stars because the service is satisfactory but still has room for improvement. Delivery is usually timely, however, there are occasional issues with product freshness and quality, especially with vegetables and perishable items. At times, items received appear old or close to expiry, which affects the overall experience. A more consistent quality check and smoother return process would make the service significantly better.

I just ordered 3 items and the order was canceled. This is not Ola/Uber that u can cancel the customer's order like this and without any intimation. also u increased the price directly ₹30 more and this is not right at all
It's Best in service & giving updates of the material in stock or in short. Person delivery the orders are friendly. I find it more useful.

i was enjoying this app until i came across this: one of my friends made a list, totalling 1103 rs. as it was his first, he got a 50 rs. discount. 1053 total. then a 2 rs handling charge, 1055 total. he then shared the list with me, mine was 1103 plus 8 rs. handling charge. 6 rs. more is not a big deal financially, but ethically, i find it disturbing to charge me more out of nothing.
